message:
refactor(pager): extract read_page_from_wal_backend helper with WalReadLookup enum (bd-db300.3.8.7)

The three WAL shared-lock read sites (read_page_for_txn variants and
the cached WAL fast path) all duplicated the same try-pinned-then-
fallback-to-write-lock pattern using error-based control flow.

Extract a read_page_from_wal_backend() function that encapsulates the
shared-lock-first strategy behind a WalReadLookup enum
(Ready(Option<Vec<u8>>) | NeedsWriteFallback), replacing the
FrankenError::internal sentinel hack with proper typed control flow.
All three call sites now reduce to a single
read_page_from_wal_backend() call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
